positive: A stylized, minimalist line art design featuring a celestial map (constellations, crescent moon, planets) surrounded by delicate floral elements (wisteria, daisies). Single color palette (deep indigo and gold), suitable for screen printing, geometric, continuous line drawing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, gradients
